name: Basiq
description: MCP server for Basiq open banking - connect Australian bank accounts, fetch accounts, balances, transactions, and account-holder identity. Self-serve dashboard signup with a free tier.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: Access Token
credential_fields.description: Basiq server access_token obtained from the get_access_token tool. Tokens expire after 60 minutes; re-run get_access_token to renew.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Base64-encoded Basiq API key from the dashboard (dashboard.basiq.io). Used by get_access_token to mint short-lived access tokens.

tools.name: get_access_token
tools.description: Mint a short-lived (60 min) server access_token from your Basiq API key. NOTE: this endpoint authenticates with 'Authorization: Basic <api_key>', not the bearer header used by every other tool — pass the api_key explicitly and treat the returned access_token as the 'token' credential for subsequent calls.

scope.description: Token scope: SERVER_ACCESS (full server-side access) or CLIENT_ACCESS (browser-scoped)

tools.name: create_user
tools.description: Create a Basiq user record. A user represents one end customer whose bank accounts you will connect. Returns a userId.

mobile.description: End user's mobile number in E.164 format (e.g. +61410888666)

tools.name: get_user
tools.description: Get a Basiq user record by userId, including linked connections.

tools.name: delete_user
tools.description: Delete a Basiq user and all of their connections and data.

tools.name: create_auth_link
tools.description: Create an auth_link (hosted consent UI URL) for a user to securely connect their bank. Returns a URL to redirect the user to.

mobile.description: Optional mobile number to pre-fill the consent flow

tools.name: list_institutions
tools.description: List all supported financial institutions (banks) with IDs, names, logos, and supported features.

tools.name: get_institution
tools.description: Get details about a specific financial institution by ID.

tools.name: list_connections
tools.description: List a user's bank connections with their status and last-refresh time.

tools.name: refresh_connection
tools.description: Trigger a refresh of a bank connection to pull the latest accounts and transactions.

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List all bank accounts for a user across all connections. Returns accountId, name, type, balance, available funds, and account number.

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Get a single bank account for a user by accountId, including current balance and available funds.

tools.name: list_transactions
tools.description: List a user's transactions across all accounts. Use the filter param to scope by account, date, or status. Returns amount, description, postDate, direction, and enriched merchant/category data.

tools.name: get_transaction
tools.description: Get a single transaction for a user by transactionId.
